name: The Daily Briefing — Ambient Advantage
description: A five-minute written intelligence brief on the AI stories shaping boardroom conversations. Published every weekday morning (ET). Curated by Chiel Hendriks (Managing Director, PwC Canada).

endpoints.name: Briefings index (JSON)
endpoints.description: Every published briefing — date, headline, snippet, read time. Sorted newest-first.

endpoints.name: Markdown homepage
endpoints.description: Bulleted markdown index of every briefing (pipeline-generated).

endpoints.name: Per-day briefing markdown
endpoints.description: Markdown twin for any briefing — substitute the ISO date. Pipeline-emitted alongside each day's HTML article.

endpoints.name: LLM/agent guide
endpoints.description: Site overview, latest briefings, and pointers.
